current.label: Current Inventory
current.meaning: Owned by GCT, in hand, personally inspected, photographed by GCT, and available to ship now.
current.disclosure: In hand, inspected, and ready to ship.

network.label: Collector Network
network.meaning: Pieces not currently owned by GCT but available through trusted sourcing partners. Availability must be confirmed before purchase.
network.disclosure: Available through our trusted collector network. Final availability and timeline confirmed before purchase.

pick.label: Mir’s Picks
pick.meaning: Curated watches GCT is tracking or recommending based on value, design, rarity, or collector interest. These are not in stock and are not guaranteed available.
pick.disclosure: Curated by GCT as an interesting market opportunity or collector-worthy piece. Not currently in stock.

current_inventory.availabilityNote: In hand, inspected, and ready to ship.
current_inventory.bezel_crown_accents: Rose gold-tone bezel, crown, and dial accents
current_inventory.set_contents: Full set with box and papers
current_inventory.description_angle: Stealthy ceramic, architectural skeleton dial, modern material-focused watch with strong visual presence.
talking_points: The matte black ceramic construction gives the watch a lightweight, modern, stealthy feel.
Rose gold-tone accents add warmth and contrast without making the watch feel overly flashy.
The skeleton dial and exhibition caseback make the movement a major visual part of the experience.
At 43mm with strong contrast, it has real wrist presence and may feel large for buyers who prefer compact watches.

legacy_inventory.model: C65 Dune Aeolian GMT Blue Dial
